title: Fuzepack
description: Speak carefully... the world is listening
body:
Hop into smoother, more immersive Minecraft multiplayer with FuzePack, a lightweight Vanilla+ modpack made for easy co-op play, better solo adventures, and just the right sprinkle of quality-of-life upgrades.

✅ **Play together, talk together** — Built-in proximity voice chat makes communication natural and fun... just be careful what you say near skulk sensors 👀

✅ **Enhanced visuals & controls** — Enjoy shaders, controller support, and a clean minimap to help you explore in style

✅ **Smart improvements** — From Shulker Box tooltips to performance boosts and even sitting on stairs and slabs, FuzePack keeps things feeling fresh without losing the Minecraft charm

---

**🧩 Designed for Minecraft 1.21.5+ using Fabric**

Whether you're hosting a server with friends or vibing in singleplayer, FuzePack is all about making Minecraft feel more alive, connected, and just a bit smarter — without breaking the vanilla feel.
